---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 😕 Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 🖼️ Screenshots / Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or videos showing the bug.

*Add screenshots here*

## 📋 Environment

Please complete the following information:

- **OS**: Windows / macOS / Linux
- **Browser**: Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge (if applicable)
- **Node.js version**: x.x.x
- **npm version**: x.x.x
- **App version**: x.x.x

## 🔧 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here:

```
Error message:
...

Stack trace:
...
```

## 📊 Frequency

- [ ] This happens every time
- [ ] This happens occasionally
- [ ] This happens once

## 🎯 Impact

- [ ] Critical (application crashes / data loss)
- [ ] High (feature doesn't work)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially works)
- [ ] Low (minor inconvenience)

## 💡 Possible Solution

If you have an idea of what might be causing the issue or how to fix it, please share it.

---

**Thank you for reporting this issue! 🙏**
